name: Can I get in trouble for using AI to draft my lawsuit without a lawyer?
description: Yes, unverified AI drafting risks sanctions—use under lawyer supervision.[3]

mainEntity.name: Can I get in trouble for using AI to draft my lawsuit without a lawyer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, unverified AI drafting risks sanctions—use under lawyer supervision.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, non-lawyers practicing law via AI can face penalties, and AI output must be verified as courts ban unverified hallucinations.[3][5] Regulators view AI-generated legal advice as unauthorized practice if not overseen by a lawyer.[5] Key factors: Verify all AI content; some judges require AI use disclosure and accuracy certification; confidentiality risks if data shared.[3] Hire a lawyer to oversee any AI tools; self-drafting increases error and sanction risks. Professional review ensures compliance.
